title: Project Metadata, Assets, PyInstaller 6.21, Platforms, and Clean Launch · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved game trace contains one plausible state, timing, input, vector, rendering, collision, ownership, audio, accessibility, packaging, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in portable inspected game release candidate and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Declare Python and dependency bounds, entry point, package data, license, authorship, version, and reproducible environment metadata.
Resolve packaged resources through supported APIs instead of current working directory or mutable source paths.
Build with PyInstaller on each target OS, inspect analysis and contents, handle data and native libraries, and test one-folder before one-file.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Project Metadata
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Asteroids team handles case 7750 during a keyboard-only community arcade night. Build deterministic Python evidence to package code and licensed assets from an identified revision and prove clean offline launch on supported platforms; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Declare Python and dependency bounds, entry point, package data, license, authorship, version, and reproducible environment metadata.

Inspect the Project Metadata trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Project Metadata.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for declare python and dependency bounds, entry point, package data, license, authorship, version, and reproducible environment metadata. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Project Metadata, keep Project Metadata connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Asset Licenses
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: asteroids-asset-licenses-1tv24m" that uses case 9875 to package code and licensed assets from an identified revision and prove clean offline launch on supported platforms. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Asset Licenses.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Asset Licenses into observable performance evidence. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Asset Licenses, keep Asset Licenses connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-asset-licenses-1tv24m
# Competency: asteroids-asset-licenses.
# Case 9875: a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling.
# Operating constraint: keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision.
# Changed case: run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save.
def evidence_asteroids_asset_licenses_1tv24m(target_platforms: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, declared_assets: int = 12, packaged_assets: int = 12, licenses_recorded: bool = True, offline_launch: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1tv24m = "1tv24m-m42vt1-9875"
    assert evidence_variant_1tv24m
    evidence_axes_1tv24m = (
        "player1tv24m",
        "seed9875",
        "inputm42vt1",
        "frame1tv24m9875",
        "state98751tv24m",
        "playtestm42vt19875",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1tv24m)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, target_platforms, "package-domain"
    if clean_installs != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_installs, "platform-gap"
    if packaged_assets != declared_assets:
        return False, packaged_assets, "asset-gap"
    if not licenses_recorded or not offline_launch:
        return False, packaged_assets, "release-input"
    assert packaged_assets == declared_assets
    return True, target_platforms, "portable-build"
